oakspeople_names._note: First names blend Basque and Italian phonology. Surnames are always the settlement of birth, drawn from oakspeople_settlements.json.
oakspeople_names.naming_rule: Full name is: [first_name] of [birthplace]. Surname is never a family name — it is always the settlement where the individual was born or where they first took root. Example: Amaia of Mossburrow, Lorentxo of Dewhollow.
